name: Bouillon Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add the rice and brown it lightly, stirring occasionally until it is well coated with butter.
3. Stir in the contents of the two cans of bouillon soup, ensuring that the rice is evenly coated.
4. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 3/4 to 1 hour, or until the rice is cooked through and tender.
Serves 6.
